typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	ActionToPerform as string (),
	AWSScriptFile as string (),
	CreateLogFile as string (),
	EmailFrom as string (),
	EmailOnCall as string (),
	EmailTo as string (),
	ErrorFile as string (),
	ErrorRowCnt as integer (),
	ErrorTableRowCount as integer (),
	ErrorTableRowCount_DataSet as string (),
	ESP_Event_Nm as string (),
	ESP_Job_Nm as string (),
	Exec_SnowSQL_Via_SSIS_Batch_With_Args_Path as string (),
	File_To_Load_BSD_Forecast_Source as string (),
	File_To_Load_BSD_Plan_Source as string (),
	File_To_Load_Retail_Forecast_Source as string (),
	File_To_Load_Retail_Plan_Source as string (),
	GlobalVarFile as string (),
	GSC_Plan_Forecast_Network_Share as string (),
	LoadMasterSnowSQLScriptName as string (),
	LoadStageSnowSQLScriptName as string (),
	LoadWorkSnowSQLScriptName as string (),
	RICheckSnowSQLScriptName as string (),
	RI_InvalidFile as string (),
	S3_Command_Executable_Path as string (),
	SnowflakeConnectionName as string (),
	Snowflake_ODBC_Query_Error_Table_Name as string (),
	Snowflake_ODBC_Query_Schema_Name as string (),
	Snowflake_ODBC_Query_Work_Table_Name as string (),
	SSISLogFileName as string (),
	SSISLogFolderPath as string (),
	SSISPackageFolder as string (),
	vSubjPage as string (),
	WorkFinancePlanFile as string (),
	WorkFinancePlanFilePath as string (),
	WorkTableRowCount as integer (),
	WorkTableRowCount_DataSet as string ()
}

source(output(
		{} as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WORKDB.GSC_FINANCE_PLAN_WORK;',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> ODBCSource
ODBCSource sink(input(
		{} as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	mapColumn(
		{})) ~> OutputPlaceHolderRecordsetDestination
